subject: [RFC PATCH v4 14/27] mm/memory-tiers: NP_OPS_DEMOTION - support private node demotion

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the complexity of the demotion logic and suggested re-evaluating the approach to allow less fallback and kick kswapd instead.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series introduces support for private node demotion in the memory-tier subsystem. It adds a new flag, NP_OPS_DEMOTION, to indicate that a node can be added as a demotion target. The patch also includes changes to allow private nodes to reject new demotions cleanly and prevent LRU inversion.
